title: Support location columns in Forms
excerpt:
Hello there, 
Forms including requests about address information are legion… Could you please please include the columns of type location in the columns supported by Forms !? 
Thank you for the support !

posts.author: Arnaud (Arnaud Prigent)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there,

Forms including requests about address information are legion… Could you please please include the columns of type location in the columns supported by Forms !?

Thank you for the support !

posts.author: Giovanni (g.gugliuzza@eurohydro.com)
posts.cookedHtml:
Same here, would love this feature.
Cheers

posts.author: Arnaud (Arnaud Prigent)
posts.cookedHtml: @Julia-monday.com Any visibility on this by any chance ?

posts.author: brett-monday.com (Brett Dalton)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Arnaud thanks for this message and for following up! Sorry for the delay here.

To be transparent with you, I do know this is something we are looking into adding in the future, though I do not have any timeline on when it will be released as we do have to figure out mapping with our maps integrations piece.

I will be sure to pass this along to the team and make sure the product developers look more closely into this.

Thanks for the feedback !

posts.author: Peter (Peter)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

Locatio on the Forms still highly important especialy if its used as a booking form for a service or a product.

Please let me know once you have added this

posts.author: IchbinAlf (Florian Schneider)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey, has there been any improvement on this topic?
Or is there a temporary workaround till the feature is implemented?

Thanks for your feedback

posts.author: Asger (Asger Schliemann-Haug)
posts.cookedHtml: Was there any updates on this feature.

posts.author: MCautreels (Maarten Cautreels - Tryve)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Everyone,

I don’t know exactly when this was added but in the meantime you can add a Location column to a Workform and allow both internal and external users to fill in using the auto complete just as you’re used to within monday boards.

Best,

Maarten
